data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the claim status workflow (open, reviewing, approved, closed), which is a critical need outlined in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or records that demonstrate the existence or functionality of this workflow. This absence of evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement, as there are no endpoints or entities referenced that confirm the claim status transitions.
gaps: No evidence of claim status workflow (open, reviewing, approved, closed).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
